error_signature: pagination not working in http request node
title: Pagination not functioning due to nested JSON
symptom: The pagination feature in the HTTP Request node does not increment the page number as expected, leading to invalid JSON errors when left empty.
applies_when: API requires pagination with pageNumber parameter
not_this_if: pageNumber is a direct query parameter
Using a different API without pagination
root_cause: The pageNumber parameter is nested within a URL-encoded JSON string in the RequestBody, preventing n8n's pagination feature from accessing and modifying it correctly during execution.
fix_steps: Modify the RequestBody to construct the JSON string dynamically using an expression.
Set the pageNumber to {{ $pageCount }} within the JSON string.
URL-encode the entire JSON string for the RequestBody.
agent_instruction: Dynamically construct the RequestBody with the pageNumber set to {{ $pageCount }} and URL-encode it.
